title: Walking T-Rex Dinosaurs Toy for Kids, Realistic Dinosaur Figure Robot, Roaring, Lights and Sounds, Educational Gifts for Boys Girls 3 4 5 6 Years Old
features: T-Rex: Tyrannosaurus design. Realistic texture and bright colors. Kids can know more about t-rex, like the shape of front paws, back etc. Great for play and collection.
Walking and Roaring: The dinosaur can move forward with its feet when open the button. And the body can swing up and down. Also can make realistic dinosaur roaring sound.
Colorful Lights: When walking forward, the dinosaur can flash colorful light on the throat and the tail. And the lights on the throat can project to the floor.
Dinosaur Toy- Size: 28X11X19cm. 2 AA batteries required (not included). Made of high quality material with smooth edges. Suitable for kids from 3 years old.
Gift for Kids 3 4 5 6 Years Old: The king of dinosaur - T-Rex. Always can attract your kid's attention. And they like to make friends with dinosaurs. Great gift for your boys, girls, toddlers.
